name: pcb-tools
description: Code-first PCB design tooling for Claude Code.

plugins.name: pcb-design
plugins.description: Code-first KiCad PCB design: describe a board in one Python spec, generate the layout, autoroute with freerouting, run JLCPCB DFM gate checks, and export gerbers/drill/BOM/CPL. Works for 2- and 4-layer boards.
